subject: Re: Pool House option A
body:
o,no,no,..   the arches enclose the doors... there has
to be a back terrace.  large enought to sit 
compfortably I want steps all the way accross the
front.. I sent you the frick.. steps ,  a terrace and
then arches.. Where are we on the main house?  

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

> J,
> This version has the pilasters going all the way
> down, giving to the arches more hight and more
> elegance. Note that we extended the roof with a flat
> pôrtion [as the main cottage], and the steps
> continue behind the arches. So before you enter the
> pool area you have a covered porche. Also ; the
> middle arch has a portico surrounded with tho
> smaller columns. J.P.
>

body_html:
o,no,no,.. the arches enclose the doors... there has
to be a back terrace. large enought to sit
compfortably I want steps all the way accross the
front.. I sent you the frick.. steps , a terrace and
then arches.. Where are we on the main house?

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

J,
This version has the pilasters going all the way
down, giving to the arches more hight and more
elegance. Note that we extended the roof with a flat
pôrtion [as the main cottage], and the steps
continue behind the arches. So before you enter the
pool area you have a covered porche. Also ; the
middle arch has a portico surrounded with tho
smaller columns. J.P.
